title: camera_params
description: Calibration parameters for a single ground-based camera. Used by projection_utils.load_camera_parameters() to project GPS positions to image pixels.

intrinsics.description: Camera intrinsic matrix K (3×3). Row-major. Encodes focal length and principal point: [[fx, 0, cx], [0, fy, cy], [0, 0, 1]]. For most cameras fx == fy (square pixels). cx/cy are typically image_width/2 and image_height/2.

distortion.description: OpenCV lens distortion coefficients [k1, k2, p1, p2, k3]. Passed directly to cv2.projectPoints(). Negative k1 = barrel distortion; positive k1 = pincushion. p1/p2 are tangential (usually 0.0 for well-mounted lenses).

rotation.description: Rotation matrix R (3×3, row-major) that rotates ENU world coordinates into camera frame. Obtained from the calibration procedure (sun/moon matching). Together with 'translation', forms the extrinsic transform [R | t].

translation.description: Translation vector t (length-3) in the camera/ENU frame, in metres. Forms the extrinsic transform together with 'rotation'. Loaded as a (3,1) column vector by projection_utils.

origin_gps.description: WGS-84 GPS position of the ENU coordinate origin (i.e. the camera site). All aircraft positions are converted to ENU relative to this point before projection.

alt.description: Altitude above WGS-84 ellipsoid in metres.

img_resolution.description: Native image resolution of the camera. Optional — not used by projection_utils, but useful for bounds-checking projected pixel coordinates.

timezone.description: IANA timezone string for the camera site. Used when parsing image filenames that encode local time (e.g. UW-Madison HH_MM_SS.trig+00.jpg). Optional.

timestamp_format.description: Moment.js-style format string for any site-specific timestamp parsing. Optional — only needed when the default image_data_utils parser does not cover the filename convention.
